case_title: VALERIAN DOBRE VS. STANFORD COURT RENAISSANCE HOTEL

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $7,000.00 FILED BY DOBRE, VALERIAN 	0445-111 AS TO DEFENDANT STANFORD COURT RENAISSANCE HOTEL ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAY-07-2010 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506

APPLICATION FOR WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO G.C. 68633, CRC 3.51, 8.26, AND 8.818 (CONFIDENTIAL) FILED BY PLAINTIFF DOBRE, VALERIAN 	0445-111 ORDER FOR WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS GRANTED PURSUANT TO G.C. 68634 (E), CRC 3.52
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAY-07-2010 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF DOBRE, VALERIAN 	0445-111 IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT STANFORD COURT RENAISSANCE HOTEL STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
REQUEST FOR AN ORDER TO APPEAR BY TELEPHONE FILED BY PLAINTIFF.

ORDER ON REQUEST TO APPEAR BY TELEPHONE, FILED. REQUEST GRANTED. PER ORDER: 1. THE COURT DOES NOT AND WILL NOT ACCEPT COLLECT TELEPHONE CALLS FROM THE PARTIES. 2. THE CLERK SHALL PROVIDE PLAINTIFF WITH INFORMATION FOR APPEARANCE BY TELEPHONE.
EXHIBITS FROM EXHIBIT REPORT DATED AUG-02-2010 ORDERED DESTROYED
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL FILED BY PLAINTIFF DOBRE, VALERIAN 	0445-111 AS TO DEFENDANT STANFORD COURT RENAISSANCE HOTEL
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED MAR-30-2010, COURT CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT STANFORD COURT RENAISSANCE HOTEL

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF MAY-07-2010 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF MAR-07-2010 BY PAUL SLAVIT. PLAINTIFF APPEARS BY TELEPHONE. DEFENDANT APPEARS IN COURT. PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT EXHIBITS RETAINED. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506)
NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT SENT TO PLAINTIFF VALERIAN DOBRE, RETURNED "UNABLE TO FORWARD/INSUFFICIENT ADDRESS".
